creator: lessmith@ddpress.com
text:
When booting from Floppy to do install the following occurs:
Fatal Trap1: Privleged instruction fault while in kernel mode
639/31744 k of mem
instruction point - 0x8:0xf01b99aa
stack point = 0x10:0x3fbfff38
frame point = 0x10:0x3fbfff50
core segment - base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type DPLO,Pres; def 32_1,gren1
processor eflags - resume, IOPL=0
current process = 0()
interrrupt mask = net tty bio
panic - privileged instruction fault

Press any key or wait 15 seconds for reboot

How-To-Repeat: Reboot --- everytime
